Benz-ac..personality: A restless, fluctuating constitution prone to fixation on unpleasant things and marked by erratic, changeable states. The person is sensitive to environmental shifts, particularly cold and weather changes, and their overall wellbeing swings in cycles tied to internal metabolic rhythms.
Benz-ac..mental_state: Inclined to dwell on unpleasant subjects, especially during prolonged periods of wakefulness at night; the sight of deformity or suffering produces an exaggerated shuddering response. Mental clarity and distress alternate in sync with physical symptoms, with foggy, dull aching states giving way to periods of stuporous, unrefreshing sleep.
Benz-ac..emotional_pattern: A prevailing sadness underlies the temperament, punctuated by anxiety that intensifies during perspiration. In children the disposition is cross and irritable, while in adults there is a deep restlessness and inability to find comfort, with no emotional relief even from sleep or sweating.
